CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Atish A. Singh.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Harold Olson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Lodging, LLC.
Tania Mugadarati, General Manager for San Francisco Lodging, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
Balvant Patel, General Manager for San Francisco Lodging, LLC, was placed under oath but did not calendar.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract was filed on January 9, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant on March 1, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 23, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Lodging, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Atish A. Singh, as follows:

Damages - $11,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $150.50.
Costs - $576.00.

Total - $11,726.50.

Proposed judment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
